description_long: This is a low-top casual sneaker with a light brown canvas upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features white eyelets and white laces, with a reinforced white rubber toe cap for added durability. The side profile reveals subtle stitching details and a slightly raised heel, while the front view highlights the symmetrical lacing and rounded toe. The back of the shoe is plain, with a smooth heel counter and no visible branding. The sole is thick and flat, designed for comfort and everyday urban wear. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, suitable for a variety of casual settings.
description: A light brown canvas sneaker with white laces and a thick white rubber sole, featuring a reinforced toe cap and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the light brown canvas upper, white laces, and thick white rubber sole with a reinforced toe cap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical white laces, rounded toe, and white rubber toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the canvas upper, stitching, and sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain heel counter and the opening of the shoe.
